steps.title: Distribute the ten
steps.content:
Distribute $10$ across the second parentheses:
$$10(10y^2-120)=100y^2-1{,}200$$
So the expression becomes
$$(8{,}246+100y^2)+(100y^2-1{,}200)$$

steps.title: Add a and b
steps.content: Compute the requested sum: $$a+b=200+7{,}046=7{,}246$$ The answer is 7246.
